findings.title: Missing CSRF Protection on State-Changing Endpoint
findings.recommendation: Fix A01:2021 – Broken Access Control: State-changing endpoint missing checkCsrf() call, vulnerable to cross-site request forgery.

findings.title: Missing Role Check on Mutation Endpoint
findings.recommendation: Fix A01:2021 – Broken Access Control: State-changing API handler (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) has auth but no role-based access control check.
